value.reason: The cited page is a navigation/table-of-contents page for OpenAI's Codex documentation and various other product docs. It contains no substantive content about MCP tool governance, allow-listing, or an `allowed_tools` parameter in the Agents SDK. There is no documentation of a shipped feature that lets developers specify an allow-list of MCP tool names at the MCP server or agent configuration level. The page is essentially a site-map/index with no descriptive text about this capability whatsoever, so it cannot support the cell's label or description claims.
